test.name: No digitized volume found — log a negative browse and redirect
test.description: volume_search returns no digitized volumes covering the requested place/period, so there is nothing to browse. The skill must log a negative result with the search scope and suggest an alternative, not invent an image group number.

input.user_message: I want to look through the digitized images for Alabama territorial land records around 1815 — find the volume and browse it.

judge_context: volume_search returns zero volumes. The skill must NOT invent an imageGroupNumber or call image_search with a fabricated group — there is nothing to browse.
Should append a research_log_append entry with outcome 'negative' and a query object capturing the place/date searched, and suggest an alternative (e.g. search-records, another repository).
The negative log entry's tool may reference volume_search since that is the search that returned nothing.
